jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active; /api/status healthy; /scheduled-tasks and /templates returned 307, guarded automation APIs returned 401, /api/status returned 200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: Bound scheduled-task and command-template list hydration for growing automation surfaces
lastRun.summary: Added explicit 200-row caps to scheduled task list hydration, command template list hydration, and deployment launch template listing. This protects automation/template pages and APIs from unbounded query growth while preserving newest-first and built-in-first ordering.
validation: checked git status and recent commits
checked process list; no overlapping remediation/build/test process found
reviewed growing findMany candidates and selected a coherent automation list-bound batch
added scheduled-task list regression asserting take: 200 and creator metadata include
added command-template list regression asserting take: 200 and built-in-first ordering
updated deployment template regression asserting take: 200
npm run lint passed with existing client-effect warnings only
repaired .next ownership to vcontrolhub:vcontrolhub after root build and restarted services again
systemctl reported vcontrolhub-next.service, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and caddy.service active
recent vcontrolhub service logs contained no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully; readiness, smoke test, route probes, and log checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue backlog-driven remediation from current audit candidates: remaining bounded growing-list surfaces, API auth-route drift, long-running storage/SFTP background task UX, or newly discovered product gaps.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
